mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = u.unit_id WHERE u.is_deleted = FALSE AND u.status = 1
AND su.unit_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{unitName}, '%')
AND u.tree_path LIKE CONCAT(#{treePathPrefix}, '%')

SELECT s.unit_id, COALESCE(su.unit_name, '未分组') AS unit_name, COUNT(1) AS score_count, COALESCE(AVG(s.total_score), 0) AS average_score, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'RED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS red_count FROM work_score s INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = s.unit_id WHERE u.is_deleted = FALSE AND s.week_no = #{weekNo}
AND su.unit_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{unitName}, '%')
AND u.tree_path LIKE CONCAT(#{treePathPrefix}, '%')
GROUP BY s.unit_id, COALESCE(su.unit_name, '未分组') ORDER BY average_score DESC, red_count ASC, score_count DESC

SELECT s.id, s.week_no, s.unit_id, s.user_id, su.unit_name, u.username, u.real_name, s.attendance_days, s.attendance_score, s.weekly_work_status, s.weekly_work_score, s.discipline_score, s.discipline_remark, s.total_score, s.level, s.status, s.calculate_time FROM work_score s INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = s.unit_id WHERE u.is_deleted = FALSE AND s.week_no = #{weekNo} AND s.status = #{status}
AND su.unit_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{unitName}, '%')
AND u.tree_path LIKE CONCAT(#{treePathPrefix}, '%')
ORDER BY s.total_score ASC, s.level ASC, s.id ASC

SELECT s.week_no, COUNT(1) AS score_count, COALESCE(AVG(s.total_score), 0) AS average_score, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'RED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS red_count, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'YELLOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS yellow_count FROM work_score s INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = s.unit_id WHERE u.is_deleted = FALSE AND s.week_no <= #{weekNo}
AND su.unit_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{unitName}, '%')
AND u.tree_path LIKE CONCAT(#{treePathPrefix}, '%')
GROUP BY s.week_no ORDER BY s.week_no DESC LIMIT 4
